title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO SAMALAGUE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DAO, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, TO BARRIO SANTA MARIA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2630 / 55 OG No. 39, 8272 (September 28, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2577, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO SAMALAGUE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DAO, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, TO BARRIO SANTA MARIA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Samalague in the Municipality of Dao, Province of Antique, is changed to Barrio Santa Maria.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
